title: JNILog Configuration
description: Configuration for the libjnilog.so JNI logging payload.

functions.description: Whitelist: JNI function names to log. Empty = log all functions.

categories.description: Category shorthand — expands to function names. Merged into whitelist. Empty = none.

exclude.description: Blacklist rules. Always applied regardless of whitelist.

functions.description: JNI function names to suppress. Expands via categories below.

categories.description: Category shorthand for exclusion. Expands to function names.

regex.description: Regex patterns matched against call keys (fn|class::method(args): ret).

array_items.description: Maximum array elements to display before +N more truncation.

stack_depth.description: Native stack frames to unwind per call. 0 = off.
